testcase.name: SCRUM-6: Flight Search - Air Canada › TC007 - UI Element Visibility and Accessibility

property.name: Test Case
property.value: TC-SCRUM-6-007: All form elements are visible and accessible

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › SCRUM-6\flight-search.spec.ts:253:7 › SCRUM-6: Flight Search - Air Canada › TC007 - UI Element Visibility and Accessibility
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
Expected: true Received: false
262 | 263 | const depAirportVisible = await searchPage.isDepartureAirportInputVisible(); > 264 | expect(depAirportVisible).toBe(true); | ^ 265 | 266 | const destAirportVisible = await searchPage.isDestinationAirportInputVisible(); 267 | expect(destAirportVisible).toBe(true); at C:\Users\2000192702\Downloads\Jira_Project_8June\Jira_Project\tests\SCRUM-6\flight-search.spec.ts:264:31
